## 提交确认 / Submission confirmation

- [ ] 项目地址可以正常访问 / The project URL is publicly reachable
- [ ] 项目信息真实、准确 / The project information is accurate
- [ ] 提交内容不包含账号、密钥或私人信息 / The submission contains no credentials, secrets, or private information
